hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" && for t in tests/test_*.py; do python3 "$t" || { echo "TESTS FAILED: $t — 통과하도록 먼저 수정하세요." >&2; exit 2; }; done
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi

hooks.statusMessage: TDD guard: checking for test file…
